original_image_tags: A dark, aged document page with a coarse texture. The word "CONFIDENTIAL" is stamped at the top and bottom. The body text is typed in a monospaced font. There are two punched holes on the left margin. A handwritten number "104" is in the bottom right corner.

elements.description: The page consists entirely of typed text on a dark background. There are no photographs, sketches, diagrams, or other visual elements present.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page contains only typed text and no actual visual content like photographs or diagrams.
